{{Quote|Word around the womprat is you know how to get around. Get around the authorities that is! Har, har.|Barak's e-mail to an unknown smuggler|<ref name="SWG:SC" />}}
'''Barak''' was a member of the underworld who tasked [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] to deliver crates of contraband to various sources.

==Biography==
During [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Barak resided in the [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] [[City/Legends|township]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He once heard of a noteworthy smuggler, and sent the smuggler an [[e-mail]] requesting their assistance. The smuggler agreed to meet up with Barak to get some work. Barak had the smuggler deliver contraband to various individuals, including [[Kaleb]], [[Diala]], [[Jalen]], [[Sarlin]] and [[Kara (Human)|Kara]].<ref name="SWG:SC" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Barak was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SC" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Barak was added to the game along with the [[W:c:swg:Smuggler#Underworld Smuggler Missions|Smuggling Missions]] introduced with the update named "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 3|Chapter 3: Smugglers and Scoundrels]]," released on [[September 27]], [[2006]].<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter Archive 2006">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64186&resource=publish|text=Chapter Archive 2006}}</ref>
